title: Better Sea Lantern Crafting
description: This datapack/mod allows you to craft Sea Lanterns in a better way
body: # Better Sea Lantern Crafting Create Sea Laterns without going to the ocean monument! Now you can do so with 5 Kelp and 4 Glowstone! [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join%20our%20Discord-%235865F2.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W) ![Better Sea Lantern Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GLIi2aNS/images/bf07cbb540d7e850c53a65855232f62515c33c75.png) ## Installation ### Datapack 1. Download the Datapack. 2. Copy the .zip file into the datapacks folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\saves\\datapacks` (under Windows). Replace correspondingly. 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ### Mod 1. Download the Mod. 2. Copy the downloaded `.jar` file into the mods folder which is located under `%APPDATA%\.minecraft\mods` (under Windows). 3. Reload the World or run the `/reload` command. ## Bug Reports and Feature Requests If you found bugs or need support, contact us by joining [our discord server](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W).
